case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $11, 674.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SINGLETON, DAVINA SULTAN, RUSSELL

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $11, 674.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,000.00 BE RELEASED TO MARK NICCO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DAVINA SINGLETON. IT IF FURTHER ORDERED THAT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,674.00 IS DECLARED FORFEITED AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED AS PROVIDED BY H&S CODE 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES RIGHT TO HAVE THE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES THE CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUITE AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
